questions.question: What is the main subject doing in these frames?
questions.answer_key: A person is falling or tumbling through snow
questions.rationale: Core action visible across all frames showing movement through snow

questions.question: What type of environment or setting is shown?
questions.answer_key: A snowy outdoor location, possibly a slope or mountainside
questions.rationale: Setting essential for understanding context of the action

questions.question: What equipment or objects are visible with the person?
questions.answer_key: A blue ski pole or similar winter sports equipment
questions.rationale: Key object suggesting skiing or snowsports activity

questions.question: How many people are visible in these frames?
questions.rationale: Clarifies whether this is solo or group activity

questions.question: What is the weather condition visible in the frames?
questions.answer_key: Snowy and overcast with light blue-gray sky
questions.rationale: Weather context important for understanding hazard level
